Skill Advancement Skill advancement affected by Link Attributes and traits well as successful use and training  High Link Attributes make skill advancement faster. while low Link Attributes slow down. This represents tne fact that some people are simply bet- disposed t0 earning certain skills because of their natural abilities For example. strong ad fast characters will pick up on athletic skills faster than couch potatoes and s0 on.
